note: Early Dynastic II period: gradual urbanization and settlement expansion
Early Dynastic IIIa: proliferation of city-states
Early Dynastic IIIb: peak of city-state civilization
Late Early Dynastic: maximum settlement extent before imperial unification
Akkadian Empire unification: integrated regional system
Late Akkadian period: initial aridity stress
Fall of Akkadian Empire: political fragmentation and settlement abandonment
Collapse of classic Sumerian urban system (~2070 BCE core collapse)
Early Ur III period: initial re-settlement and regional re-integration
Ur III dynasty: re-urbanization and state-level reconstruction
Post-Ur III period: stabilized settlement system at lower equilibrium
